name: IPSecurityFlags
description: Security classification flags for the IP

is_vpn.description: IP is a known VPN endpoint

is_proxy.description: IP is a known proxy server

is_tor.description: IP is a Tor exit node

is_hosting.description: IP belongs to a hosting or cloud provider

is_relay.description: IP is used as a relay (e.g., Apple Private Relay)

is_mobile.description: IP is associated with a mobile network

is_abuse.description: IP has been flagged for abuse
